---
title: "Making Exclusion Actionable: Geographic Market Devices for Identifying Prospective College Students"
author: ["Ozan Jaquette (UCLA)*", "Karina Salazar (University of Arizona)", "Crystal Han (Stanford University)"]
format: pdf
geometry:
  margin=1in
---

**Abstract word count**: XXX words

**Text word count**: 14,150 words

- **Text**: 12,363 words
- **Footnotes**: 171 words
- **References**: 1,616 words


\vspace{200pt}



*Corresponding Author

**Address**: Moore Hall 3038, 405 Hilgard Avenue, Los Angeles, CA 90095-1521

**Phone**: (310) 206-3030

**Email**: ozanj@ucla.edu
